title: MIET College Level Hackathon
description: My first hackathon experience where I built a basic login system using HTML, CSS and JavaScript.
experience: This was my first hackathon experience. Our team built a simple login page and frontend interface using HTML, CSS and JavaScript. At that time many concepts were completely new to me and even running the project properly felt challenging. Participating itself was a big achievement because it gave me confidence to work on real projects and competitions.
challenges: Understanding how HTML, CSS and JavaScript work together while fixing errors within a limited time.
result: Won 3rd Position and received a cash award.

photos.caption: Working on our first hackathon project

title: 24-Hour Hackathon at Graphic Era, Haldwani
description: One of the most intense and memorable hackathon experiences where we built a Student Attendance and Tracking Dashboard.
experience: Before the offline hackathon, our team cleared an online selection round by building a Chrome Extension prototype. After getting selected, our team consisting of Deepanshu, Vishal, Himanshu Singh Bisht and Gaurav Giri participated in the 24-hour event. We worked continuously day and night building a Student Attendance and Tracking Dashboard. Every few hours mentors reviewed our progress and awarded points. We spent most of the time coding, debugging and improving the project. Although we did not win, it became one of the best learning experiences of my journey.
challenges: Working without proper sleep, fixing unexpected bugs, managing time and delivering features within 24 hours.
result: Successfully built and demonstrated a working Student Attendance Dashboard.

photos.caption: Working through the night during the 24-hour hackathon
Final presentation setup with our working prototype

title: Kumaun University Hackathon
description: Built an Urban AI solution focused on smart city problem identification and visualization.
experience: Our team worked on an Urban AI system focused on solving city-level problems such as waste management and civic issue tracking. We built an interactive map-based platform that highlighted problem areas and visualized important city data. The experience of travelling to Nainital, collaborating with teammates and presenting our solution to judges made this one of the most enjoyable and rewarding hackathons.
challenges: Designing a practical solution, building map-based visualizations and preparing a strong presentation within the given timeline.

photos.caption: Urban AI dashboard and map visualization
